basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 25-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agri/ B.Sc.Agri.(Hons)/ B.Sc. (Hons)Agri./ B.Sc. Biotech (Hons)/ B.Sc. Hort./ B.Sc. (Hons) Hort/ B.Sc. Forestry/ B.Sc. (Hons) Forestry with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. OR M.Sc. Agronomy/M.Sc. Soil Science/ M.Sc. Agricultural Meteorology with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks with NET may be recruited as Research Fellow. Ph.D. candidates are exempted from NET.
qualification.details: B.Sc. Agri/ B.Sc.Agri.(Hons)/ B.Sc. (Hons)Agri./ B.Sc. Biotech (Hons)/ B.Sc. Hort./ B.Sc. (Hons) Hort/ B.Sc. Forestry/ B.Sc. (Hons) Forestry with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. M.Sc. Agronomy/M.Sc. Soil Science/ M.Sc. Agricultural Meteorology with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks with NET. M.Sc. Agronomy/M.Sc. Soil Science/ M.Sc. Agricultural Meteorology with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks without NET.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- fixed + 16% HRA p.m. or Rs. 25,000/- + 16% HRA (FIXED) per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- fixed + 16% HRA p.m. Rs. 25,000/- + 16% HRA (FIXED) per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Research Fellow position at Punjab Agricultural University is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Agriculture or related fields with a minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks. Alternatively, an M.Sc. in Agronomy, Soil Science, or Agricultural Meteorology with a minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks and NET qualification is required. Ph.D. candidates are exempt from NET.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected Research Fellow will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 16% HRA, or Rs. 25,000/- per month plus 16% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Fellow position at PAU?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to obtain the prescribed proforma from the department office and send the filled application form along with the required documents and application fee to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee should be submitted in the shape of a bank draft in favour of Comptroller, PAU Ludhiana.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Fellow at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, pau.edu. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for specific age limit details. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q10. What is the walk-in date for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The interview date for the Research Fellow position is scheduled for 05th June 2026.
